Patch Set 1:

This is just a heads up on first fatal failure and a full report would be posted on test completion. See the results link above if you want intermediate results.

parents.subject: LU-10499 pcc: Check if PCC copy is unlinked for state output

commit.subject: LU-10499 pcc: make "pccro=1" default
commit.message:
LU-10499 pcc: make "pccro=1" default

To avoid a risk that users will accidentally configure PCC-RW and
potentially lose data if those client nodes go offline, this patch
makes "pccro=1" default for PCC backends.

This patch adds a new option "--w|--write" for PCC-RW cache
mode when attach a file.
Also It makes "--r|--readonly" as a default option for PCC attach
command.

EX-bug-id: EX-4006
Signed-off-by: Qian Yingjin <qian@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I56735b0ebe8f0d9ef22b3f7e39e8cccfa3aad443
